_comment: Manual corrections applied AFTER the API fetch (override always wins and persists across fetches). Use ONLY when football-data.org reports a wrong score. group format: {"<mid>": [home, away]}. ko format: {"<mid>": [homeES, awayES, homeGoals, awayGoals, advancingTeamES]}. To revert a correction once the source self-fixes, delete that entry. Currently: mid 37 = Spain 4-0 Saudi Arabia (API wrongly reported 5-0).
